mapper.insert: INSERT INTO history(history_no, space_key, task_no, reply_no, user_no, field_name, action_type, created_at, old_value, new_value) VALUES (seq_history_no.nextVal, #{space_key}, #{task_no}, #{reply_no, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{user_no}, #{field_name}, #{action_type}, SYSDATE, #{old_value, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_value, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT history_no, space_key, task_no, reply_no, user_no, field_name, action_type, created_at, old_value, new_value FROM history WHERE MONTHS_BETWEEN ( sysdate, created_at ) <= 1 AND space_key IN(SELECT space_key FROM space_members WHERE user_no = #{user_no}) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT history_no, reply_no, user_no, field_name, action_type, created_at, old_value, new_value FROM history WHERE space_key = #{space_key} AND task_no = #{task_no} ORDER BY history_no
